name: dev-crew
description: A crew of spec-writer, planner, builder, and reviewer subagents (modeled on OpenDucktor's agent workflow) that drive an issue through spec -> plan -> build -> QA, plus skills to refine an issue, run the pipeline, update a branch (resolving conflicts), create a local issue, address a PR, and merge a PR. Each agent works in a file-based or GitHub output mode.
